nasb.text: Therefore Pilate went out to them and *said, “What accusation do you bring against this Man?”

esv.text: So Pilate went outside to them and said, “What accusation do you bring against this man?”

cnv.text: 於是彼拉多走到外面見他們，說：“你們控告這個人甚麼呢？”

ccb.text: 彼拉多出来问他们：“你们控告这个人什么罪？”

csbs.text: 于是彼拉多出来，到他们那里，说：“你们提出什么来控告这个人？”
